response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The concert audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics for 'きゅるるん大作戦' (Kyururun Daisakusen).
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference for accurate transcribing and translating.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual elements (intro text and member introductions) correctly during the silence before the song. For the song performance, kept timestamps highly synchronized to the fast-paced vocals to ensure high readability.

subtitles.original: hololive 3rd Generation Live
subtitles.english: [hololive 3rd Generation Live]

subtitles.original: 兎田ぺこら
subtitles.english: [Usada Pekora]

subtitles.original: 不知火フレア
subtitles.english: [Shiranui Flare]

subtitles.original: 白銀ノエル
subtitles.english: [Shirogane Noel]

subtitles.original: 宝鐘マリン
subtitles.english: [Houshou Marine]

subtitles.original: きゅるるん大作戦
subtitles.english: [Title: Kyururun Daisakusen]

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 伝説のガールは欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idol! The legendary girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 笑い合って もっと可愛くなる
subtitles.english: Laughing together, we'll become even cuter

subtitles.original: Oh yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Oh yeah yeah

subtitles.original: と、思いきやお出かけ おめかしして
subtitles.english: Just when you thought so, we're going out all dressed up

subtitles.original: 他人なのに 家族みたいで
subtitles.english: Even though we aren't related, we're like a family

subtitles.original: Ruru Rurairai 身体測定
subtitles.english: Ruru Rurairai, physical examination

subtitles.original: Ruru Rurairai 生体セッション
subtitles.english: Ruru Rurairai, biological session

subtitles.original: 喜怒哀楽を全自動で アシストさ
subtitles.english: Automatically assisting all your emotions

subtitles.original: でっかくなっていきたいよね
subtitles.english: We want to grow big, don't we?

subtitles.original: でも小っちゃなことも大事にして
subtitles.english: But we also cherish the little things

subtitles.original: ひとつ、ふたつ 傷ついても
subtitles.english: Even if we get hurt once or twice

subtitles.original: ハグして触れるのが正しいね
subtitles.english: Hugging and touching each other is only right

subtitles.original: だからエンターテイン (エンターテイン！)
subtitles.english: So let's entertain! (Entertain!)

subtitles.original: うしろだって見えてる
subtitles.english: We can see the back rows too!

subtitles.original: 画面の向こうも届いてる
subtitles.english: And reaching those beyond the screen!

subtitles.original: 光の海を泳ごう！
subtitles.english: Let's swim in this sea of lights!

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 伝説のガールは欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idol! The legendary girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 愛されたいし 踊りまくりたい 君じゃなきゃやだ
subtitles.english: We want to be loved and dance away! It has to be you!

subtitles.original: 絶好調です！
subtitles.english: We're in top form!

subtitles.original: 狙い撃ちで 君にウィンク
subtitles.english: Taking aim, we wink at you

subtitles.original: やっぱり伝説のガールでめっちゃハッピー
subtitles.english: Being legendary girls makes us so happy after all

subtitles.original: 応援したいし 恋もしたいし 叶っちゃうよ、やった！
subtitles.english: Wanting to support and fall in love, they'll all come true, yay!

subtitles.original: 先頭走る
subtitles.english: Running at the front

subtitles.original: もちろん君と！
subtitles.english: Of course, together with you!

subtitles.original: 笑い合って もっと可愛くなる
subtitles.english: Laughing together, we'll become even cuter

subtitles.original: Oh yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Oh yeah yeah

subtitles.original: せっかく近くなったんだから 乗り越える壁もデカい
subtitles.english: Since we've gotten so close, the walls to overcome are huge too

subtitles.original: それってうんとエンタメでしょ？
subtitles.english: But isn't that what makes it so entertaining?

subtitles.original: 君が想ってるより ずっと君のこと想ってる
subtitles.english: We think about you way more than you think we do

subtitles.original: どうかなどうかな
subtitles.english: I wonder, I wonder...

subtitles.original: 焦がれた夢には近づけてるかな
subtitles.english: If we're getting any closer to our longed-for dreams

subtitles.original: この涙があるから 頑張れるんだ 聞かせて
subtitles.english: These tears are what keep us going, so let us hear you!

subtitles.original: 超最上のガールは幸せ
subtitles.english: The ultimate girls are so happy

subtitles.original: 愛されて生きてる 感謝しちゃって 下向く暇ない
subtitles.english: Living with your love, full of gratitude, with no time to look down

subtitles.original: テンポアップし続けていく
subtitles.english: We'll keep stepping up the tempo

subtitles.original: 見たい景色へ！
subtitles.english: Toward the scenery we want to see!

subtitles.original: 世界に達して (はい！ はい！)
subtitles.english: Reaching the world! (Hey! Hey!)

subtitles.original: 光を浴びてダンス (はい！ はい！)
subtitles.english: Dancing bathed in light! (Hey! Hey!)

subtitles.original: いますぐアピール (はい！ はい！)
subtitles.english: Showing off right now! (Hey! Hey!)

subtitles.original: みんなで作ってく
subtitles.english: Creating this together

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: あ、そこのきみも 盛り上がっていくぞ！
subtitles.english: Ah, you over there too, let's pump it up!

subtitles.original: 切り出せ、まだまだ 声 出せますよね！
subtitles.english: Let's start it off, you can still scream louder, right?!

subtitles.original: いっせーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, set, go!
